meaning: adj.有两耳的,两耳用的,[声]双耳声的
examples: It is active at extremely low doses, and we have captured its' essence in binaural form.
The second component of this product is the binaural audio tones that are interwoven into the music.
Beyond filling in the gaps in our knowledge of binaural fusion, we hope to begin addressing other problems.
What we now call i-dosing are sounds previously known as binaural beats that have been used for research and sleep therapy.
